title: Radio Ga Ga
why_this_song: Radio Ga Ga by Queen (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 30 times; first heard in: "I heard it on my radio"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "All we hear is radio ga ga"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You gave them all those old time stars"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Radio blah blah"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I'd sit alone and watch your light"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "radio" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "radio" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hear" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hear" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'd sit alone and watch your light
All we hear is radio ga ga

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Radio Ga Ga" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Radio Ga Ga" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Radio Ga Ga" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Radio Ga Ga"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Queen one question about "Radio Ga Ga", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Queen sobre "Radio Ga Ga", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
